summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AddEmployeeWizard component and Staff module features. All requested features are working correctly including the 3-step wizard flow, employee creation via API, and UI components.
passed_tests: Frontend: Login flow works and redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Staff Planning page displays correctly with all controls
Frontend: Staff Planning has timeframe toggles (1 Semaine, 15 Jours, 1 Mois) - all functional
Frontend: Staff Planning has shift type legend (M/S/N/OFF/Repos/CP/MAL/F) - all 8 items present
Frontend: Staff Planning has Mode Lecture/Historique view buttons
Frontend: Staff Planning has H/MOIS column header
Frontend: Personnel page has Liste/Trombinoscope toggle - both functional
Frontend: Click 'Ajouter' button (data-testid='btn-new-employee') opens wizard modal
Frontend: Wizard Step 1 shows personal information form (Prenom, Nom, Email, Telephone, Adresse, Ville, Code postal, Date de naissance, N Securite sociale, Contact d'urgence)
Frontend: Wizard Step 2 shows professional info (Service, Poste, Type de contrat, Date d'embauche, Heures/semaine, Taux horaire, Salaire mensuel brut, IBAN, BIC)
Frontend: Wizard Step 3 shows document upload section with 7 required documents list (CNI, Carte Vitale, RIB, Photo d'identite, Diplome(s), Attestation Securite Sociale, Permis de travail)
Frontend: Wizard Step 3 has Importer and Scanner buttons for each document
Frontend: Wizard step indicators show correct progress (3 steps with checkmarks for completed)
Frontend: Employee creation works when completing wizard - shows success toast 'Collaborateur cree avec succes!'
Frontend: New employee appears in Personnel list after creation
Frontend: Trombinoscope view displays employee cards correctly
Backend: POST /api/hotels/{id}/staff/employees creates new employee successfully (201 response)
seed_data_creation: Created test employees: WizardTest Employee, TEST_Jean TEST_Dupont (via wizard and API testing)
context_for_next_testing_agent: AddEmployeeWizard component is fully functional with 3 steps: Personal info, Professional info, Documents. The wizard uses modal-overlay class and opens via data-testid='btn-new-employee' button. Document upload is MOCKED - files are stored in form state only, not persisted to backend storage. All Staff module features (Planning, Personnel with Liste/Trombinoscope views) are working correctly.

mocked_apis_list: Document storage upload - files stored in form state only, not persisted to backend storage

add_employee_wizard.step_1_personal_info: Prenom, Nom, Email, Telephone, Adresse, Ville, Code postal, Date de naissance, N Securite sociale, Contact d'urgence
add_employee_wizard.step_2_professional_info: Service, Poste, Type de contrat, Date d'embauche, Heures/semaine, Taux horaire, Salaire mensuel brut, IBAN, BIC
add_employee_wizard.step_3_documents: 7 document types with Importer/Scanner buttons (CNI, Carte Vitale, RIB, Photo, Diplome, Attestation SS, Permis travail)
add_employee_wizard.step_indicators: 3 wizard-step indicators with checkmarks for completed steps

staff_planning.shift_legend: M (Matin), S (Soir), N (Nuit), OFF, Repos, CP (Conge paye), MAL (Maladie), F (Ferie)

personnel_page.liste_columns: COLLABORATEUR, SERVICE, POSTE, CONTRAT, TEMPS, TELEPHONE, EMAIL, STATUT
personnel_page.trombinoscope: Employee cards with avatar, name, position, department, contract badge, status
